title: Perator
content:
{{Top|leg}}
A '''perator''' was a monarch on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] of [[Adumar/Legends|Adumar]]. The position was hereditary, and each Adumari nation had its own perator.<ref name="X-Wing: SOA">''[[X-Wing: Starfighters of Adumar]]''</ref>

==Appearances==
*''[[X-Wing: Starfighters of Adumar]]''
*[[X-Wing: Starfighters of Adumar (abridged audiobook)|''X-Wing: Starfighters of Adumar'' abridged audiobook]]
